languages.text: "Планировал. Лобные оковы не дают заснуть, не дают забыться и дорого за это просят. Тот, что вшил в меня железо, уже получил свое, алого жреца убить сложнее. Но не волнуйтесь, я припас для него хорошую пушку". {n}Человек поспешно указывает подбородком на свое оружие.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Планировал. Лобные оковы не дают заснуть, не дают забыться и дорого за это просят. Тот, что вшил в меня железо, уже получил свое, алого жреца убить сложнее. Но не волнуйтесь, я припас для него хорошую пушку". {n}Человек поспешно указывает подбородком на свое оружие.{/n}
traits.speaker: MB_FV_Avenger_Officer

languages.text: "I did. The cranial shackles keep you from sleep, keep you from oblivion, but take a heavy toll. The one who put the iron in me has already gotten his due, though killing the crimson priest is harder. But don't worry, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I did. The cranial shackles keep you from sleep, keep you from oblivion, bur take a heavy toll. The one who put the iron in me has already gotten his due, though killing the scarlet priest is harder. But don't worry, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}

"I did. The cranial shackles helped me work everything out. They are good at calculating, but they charge a heavy price. The one who put the iron in me has already gotten his due, but killing the scarlet priest is harder. But worry not, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}

languages.text: "Ja. Die kranialen Ketten verhindern, dass Ihr schlaft und bewahren Euch vor der Vergessenheit. Allerdings fordern sie einen hohen Preis. Der, der mir das Eisen eingepflanzt hat, hat bereits bekommen, was er verdient. Den roten Preister zu töten, ist allerdings schwieriger. Aber keine Sorge, ich habe eine hübsche kleine Waffe für ihn."{n}Der Mann deutet mit seinem Kinn auf die Waffe.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I did. The cranial shackles keep you from sleep, keep you from oblivion, but take a heavy toll. But don't worry, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}

Aber keine Sorge, ich habe eine hübsche kleine Waffe für ihn."{n}Der Mann deutet mit seinem Kinn auf die Waffe.{/n}

languages.text: « Oui. Si les entraves crâniennes vous empêchent de sombrer dans un sommeil dont on ne ressort jamais, il y a un prix à payer. Celui qui m'a implanté ce fer a déjà eu ce qu'il méritait, mais le prêtre écarlate risque d'être une autre paire de manches. Mais pas d'inquiétude, je suis déjà équipé pour l'occasion, » {n}termine l'homme en désignant l'arme du menton avec enthousiasme.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I did. The cranial shackles keep you from sleep, keep you from oblivion, but take a heavy toll. The one who put the iron in me has already gotten his due, though killing the crimson priest is harder. But don't worry, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}

Mais pas d'inquiétude, je suis déjà équipé pour l'occasion, » {n}termine l'homme en désignant l'arme du menton avec enthousiasme.{/n}

languages.text: “没错。颅骨枷锁让你无法入睡，也无法坠入虚无，但代价极其惨痛。给我脑袋里塞铁块的那个混蛋已经遭报应了，可要杀掉那个红衣神甫，可没那么容易。不过别担心，我特意为他准备了一把好枪。”{n}男人急切地用下巴朝那件武器示意。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I did. The cranial shackles keep you from sleep, keep you from oblivion, but take a heavy toll. The one who put the iron in me has already gotten his due, though killing the crimson priest is harder. But don't worry, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “没错。颅骨枷锁让你无法入睡，也无法坠入虚无，但代价极其惨痛。给我脑袋里塞铁块的那个混蛋已经遭报应了，可要杀掉那个红衣神甫，可没那么容易。不过别担心，我特意为他准备了一把好枪。”{n}男人急切地用下巴朝那件武器示意。{/n}

languages.text: «Así es. Los grilletes craneales impiden dormir e impiden quedar inconsciente, pero exigen un alto precio. El que me instaló el hierro ya se ha llevado su merecido, pero matar al sacerdote carmesí es más difícil. Pero no se preocupe, tengo el arma lista». {n}El hombre indica con la barbilla la pistola que sujeta.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I did. The cranial shackles keep you from sleep, keep you from oblivion, but take a heavy toll. But don't worry, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}

Pero no se preocupe, tengo el arma lista». {n}El hombre indica con la barbilla la pistola que sujeta.{/n}

languages.text: 「やったとも。頭蓋の枷は、眠ることも、忘却に逃れることも許さず、しかも重い代償を強いる。私に鉄を埋め込んだ者はもう報いを受けた――もっとも、緋色の司祭を殺すのはもっと難しいがな。だが心配するな、奴のために上等な銃を一丁用意してある。」{n}男は熱心に顎で武器を指し示す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I did. The cranial shackles keep you from sleep, keep you from oblivion, but take a heavy toll. The one who put the iron in me has already gotten his due, though killing the crimson priest is harder. But don't worry, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「やったとも。頭蓋の枷は、眠ることも、忘却に逃れることも許さず、しかも重い代償を強いる。私に鉄を埋め込んだ者はもう報いを受けた――もっとも、緋色の司祭を殺すのはもっと難しいがな。だが心配するな、奴のために上等な銃を一丁用意してある。」{n}男は熱心に顎で武器を指し示す。{/n}

languages.text: "Evet. Kafatası prangaları beni uykudan alıkoyuyor, unutuluştan alıkoyuyor. Fakat bunun bedeli ağır. İçime demiri koyan kişi cezasını buldu bile, gerçi o kızıl rahibi öldürmek daha zor. Fakat merak etmeyin, onun için hazırda beklettiğim güzel, küçük bir silahım var."{n}Adam, çenesiyle hevesle silahı işaret ediyor.{/n}
